{{Quote|Freedom is everybody's fight.|Demma Moll|<ref name="Escape Into Terror">{{DroidsCite|Escape Into Terror}}</ref>}}
'''Demma Moll''' was a woman in her mid-forties during the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the leader of a [[Annoo resistance|resistance cell]] on her homeworld, [[Annoo (Gelefil)|Annoo]]. She was the mother of [[Kea Moll]].

==Biography==
Demma and Kea lived on the family farm on Annoo, which led to trouble with the gangster [[Sise Fromm]], who wanted to take possession of the property. Demma was opposed to the tyranny of the crime gangs and the Empire and felt that evil had to be fought.

When she discovered that the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]] were constructing a powerful weapons satellite, ''[[Trigon One]]'', which they intended to use to take over the other gangs, Demma charged Kea with finding and destroying ''Trigon One''. With the assistance of the [[Landspeeder/Legends|speeder]] racers, [[Thall Joben/Legends|Thall Joben]] and [[Jord Dusat]], along with their droids, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], Kea succeeded in breaking into [[Tig Fromm]]'s secret base on [[Ingo/Legends|Ingo]] and stealing ''Trigon One''.

While Joben hid the weapons satellite in a forest on Ingo, the Fromm Gang kidnapped Demma and Dusat from the farm. Joben agreed to reveal the location in exchange for their release. Tig Fromm went to retrieve ''Trigon One'', but Joben and R2-D2 had sabotaged the guidance system, causing the ship to collide with and destroy Sise Fromm's base on Annoo.

==Behind the scenes==
Demma Moll was voiced by [[Toby Tarnow]].
